resume.aboutDesc: I am a full-stack web developer and educator based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. I specialize in building modern, performant web applications with Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS. Alongside development, I teach English and offer private tutoring, combining technical expertise with a passion for education.
